title: Mapping Collection File
description: Schema for a mapping collection file in 05-mappings/mappings/. Each file groups related mapping records from a single source to one or more control domains. The individual mapping objects within the 'mappings' array conform to the structure defined in mapping.schema.json.

source_id.description: Primary source ID for this collection file. Informational — individual mapping records each carry their own source_id.

domain.description: Primary control domain this collection covers. Informational.

mappings.description: One or more mapping records. Each record links a standard clause to a platform control.

source_clause.description: Specific clause within the standard. Use [PLACEHOLDER: ...] if unresearched.

source_clause_text.description: Brief quoted text from the standard clause for human reference.

rationale.description: Why this clause was interpreted as this control in this platform's context.

mapping_type.description: derived: direct derivation. partial: partial coverage. extended: control goes beyond the clause. adopted: practice adopted as-is.
